configuration.title: Next Edit Suggestions
configuration.enabled.description: Control which file types receive next edit suggestions. Use '*' for the default, and specify language IDs (e.g., 'python', 'markdown') to override. Set to { "*": false } to disable completely.
configuration.selectedCompletionModel.de: Model ID to use for suggestions. Leave empty for automatic model selection.
